typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		TMID as string,
		SupervisorDescription as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'FileName',
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/Sitepro/Sitepro_Employee/Sitepro_Employee.csv']) ~> srcEmployeeSiteproStage
srcEmployeeSiteproStage derive(FileName = concat('Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/Sitepro_Employee/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/','Sitepro_Employee_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkSiteproEmployeeSiteproRaw
